bullets: Product strategy & research: conducted end-to-end service design research using personas, journey maps, and as-is blueprints to surface critical friction points; applied decision matrices and fishbone analysis to prioritize a product roadmap focused on high-impact usability improvements.

Conversion-driven information architecture: redesigned website architecture, information hierarchy, and navigation to streamline the client acquisition funnel and improve task completion and findability for target audiences.

Visual product identity & production: produced high-fidelity architectural photography and integrated visual assets with the UX framework to create a cohesive digital brand identity that strengthened market credibility and marketing effectiveness.

role: Internal Product Designer — POS Ecosystem Optimization
bullets: Spearheaded the digital transformation of a legacy POS system, resolving critical technical debt and operational failures to ensure 100% system uptime during high-traffic business hours.
Re-engineered the end-to-end service blueprint, streamlining the order-to-fulfillment journey for staff which significantly reduced manual input errors and order processing latency.
Optimized business efficiency by consolidating fragmented legacy tools into a unified internal product, enhancing staff productivity and driving a seamless customer dining experience.
Supported major Toronto events including Annual Dinner 2025, DesignTO, CANFAR's Bloor Street Entertain 28, Limitless Gala 2024, CAFA Awards 2024, and on-call work for Floral Werx | Europe Elegant.
Executed event setups from concept boards, including table styling, venue décor, auction displays, and backstage support.
Optimized wayfinding and spatial systems for high-volume environments, iterating on service delivery in real time based on logistical constraints and live user feedback.
Designed integrated brand and audience experiences across visual systems, motion assets, and spatial environments for live events and campaigns.
Translated client objectives into structured experience concepts that connected digital visuals with physical interactions, improving coherence across touchpoints.
Collaborated with planners, marketers, and production teams to deliver end-to-end audience journeys and produced asset libraries and design specifications for seamless implementation.
